'''Shikitari''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="DB" /> located somewhere within the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].<ref name="EAOC" /><ref name="DB" /> In the world's lush [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] lived a rare [[Sentience/Legends|subsentient]] species of [[Shikitari (species)|insectoids]] that shared their name with their homeworld. Shikitari were born in clusters of [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] suspended in a [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] protective gel that warded off [[Diet/Legends|predators]]. As the eggs hatched, the developing [[Pupa/Legends|pupae]] fused together, growing into a single combined lifeform. The pupae developed a body structure that mimicked their guardian. However, this stage of their life cycle was extremely short, and the unified organism later became encased in a hardened chrysalis,<ref name="DB" /> from which emerged a dozen harmless creatures.<ref name="CE">{{CSWECite|I|109|Carl}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The [[2006]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'' mentioned a «Shikitari insectoid»; nevertheless, it did not confirm which specific character was being referred to. Shortly later, the [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|online supplement]] to the reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' introduced the [[Shikitari system/Legends|Shikitari system]], located in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. The planet Shikitari, in particular, was first and last mentioned in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry for the character [[Carl]] on the official ''[[Star Wars]]'' website, [[StarWars.com]], in [[2011]].
